name: World Monitor
description: Real-time global situational-awareness platform spanning OSINT, geopolitics, infrastructure, energy, shipping, aviation, cyber and financial markets.
summary: High-value fork candidate for a local-first geopolitical and macro-finance cockpit. Preserve its map, panel, data-freshness, local-AI and programmatic-access foundations while strengthening market provenance, session awareness, structural news-to-ticker joins and durable history.
useCases: Run a unified geopolitical, macro, commodity and infrastructure intelligence cockpit.
Feed read-only event-risk context into the Stock Market Agent Runtime.
Build an Australia and ASX-focused analyst workspace without replacing the approved App Shell.
Use its REST, OpenAPI, MCP, CLI and SDK surfaces in agent workflows.
Study production patterns for freshness monitoring, cache coalescing, multi-variant dashboards and desktop sidecars.

maintenance.notes: Rapidly developed and extensively documented, with a large active issue and pull-request surface. Pin known-good upstream commits and revalidate before each sync.

risk.notes: AGPL obligations apply to the platform. Upstream-data terms, undocumented market endpoints, current authentication debt and non-exchange-grade finance data require separate review. Do not use as an execution or authoritative market-data terminal.

notes: Primary value is cross-domain finance-in-context rather than deep company fundamentals or exchange-grade pricing.
Preserve upstream copyright and licence notices in every mirror and enhancement branch.
Prefer authorised providers and explicit provenance for production finance use.
Initial enhancement target: market-session semantics, observation provenance, local diagnostics and an opt-in Australia/ASX workspace.
